title: United Rentals: Attractively Valued With Good Growth Prospects
text: United Rentals, Inc. is well-positioned to benefit from secular demand tailwinds and a shift from ownership to renting equipment. The company's revenue is supported by strong end-market demand, with growth in both the General Rentals and Specialty segments. United Rentals' margins are expected to improve through cost synergies, operating leverage, and a shift towards higher-margin specialty business.

title: United Rentals: Secular Trends And Internal Growth Can Push Higher
text: United Rentals is the market leader in equipment rental with a 17% market share. The company has shown consistent growth in revenue, EBIT, and EPS over the past 10 years. The favorable market conditions and strong financial performance make United Rentals a buy.
